set(SDL_VIDEO ON)
set(SDL_EVENTS ON)
set(SDL_THREADS ON)
set(SDL_LOADSO ON)

# 禁用所有其他功能
set(SDL2_DISABLE_INSTALL OFF)
set(SDL_AUDIO OFF)
set(SDL_JOYSTICK OFF)
set(SDL_HAPTIC OFF)
set(SDL_SENSOR OFF)
set(SDL_POWER OFF)
set(SDL_FILE OFF)
set(SDL_TIMERS OFF)
set(SDL_CPUINFO OFF)
set(SDL_FILESYSTEM OFF)
set(SDL_DLOPEN OFF)
set(SDL_LOCALE OFF)
set(SDL_MISC OFF)
set(SDL_RENDER OFF)
set(SDL_OPENGL OFF)
set(SDL_OPENGLES OFF)
set(SDL_VULKAN OFF)
set(SDL_METAL OFF)
set(SDL_RENDER_D3D OFF)
set(SDL_KMSDRM OFF)
set(SDL_OFFSCREEN OFF)
set(SDL_RPI OFF)
set(SDL_COCOA OFF)  # 我们将根据平台单独启用一个后端
set(SDL_DIRECTX OFF)
set(SDL_WAYLAND OFF)
set(SDL_X11 OFF)

# 进一步禁用内部功能
set(SDL_SSE OFF)
set(SDL_SSE2 OFF)
set(SDL_AVX OFF)
set(SDL_NEON OFF)
set(SDL_ALTIVEC OFF)
set(SDL_ASSEMBLY OFF)  # 禁用汇编优化
set(SDL_OSS OFF)
set(SDL_ALSA OFF)
set(SDL_SNDIO OFF)
set(SDL_DISKAUDIO OFF)
set(SDL_DUMMYAUDIO OFF)
set(SDL_DUMMYVIDEO OFF)

set(SDL_TEST OFF)
set(SDL_SHARED OFF)

add_subdirectory(SDL)

set_property(TARGET sdl_headers_copy PROPERTY FOLDER "ThirdParty/SDL2")
set_property(TARGET SDL2main PROPERTY FOLDER "ThirdParty/SDL2")
set_property(TARGET SDL2-static PROPERTY FOLDER "ThirdParty/SDL2")
